question: Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
effective_question: Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
answer:
Based on the results, the sensor channels installed on T-014 are:

- load_current_a
- oil_temp_c
- power_factor
- voltage_hv_kv
- voltage_lv_kv
- winding_temp_top_c

The anomaly check on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) revealed 33 anomalies over 720 readings, with an anomaly rate of 4.58%. However, the trend analysis on the same channel showed a stable trend with a mean value of 78.7305°C, a minimum value of 40.466°C, and a maximum value of 118.002°C. The slope per day was 0.160935, indicating a slight increase in temperature over time.
